description_long: This object consists of three national flags—Malaysia, China, and South Korea—each mounted on a slender, vertical black pole. The flags are arranged side by side, with each flag displaying its distinctive design and colors: the Malaysian flag with red and white stripes, a blue canton, and a yellow crescent and star; the Chinese flag with a red field and five yellow stars; and the South Korean flag with a white field, a red and blue yin-yang symbol, and four black trigrams. The flags appear to be made of fabric, slightly waving as if caught in a gentle breeze, and are attached securely to the poles. The poles are simple, cylindrical, and uniform in color and thickness, likely made of metal or plastic. The flags are proportionally sized to the poles, and the overall grouping suggests a display for international or diplomatic purposes.
description: A set of three national flags—Malaysia, China, and South Korea—mounted on black vertical poles, each flag vividly displaying its unique design and colors.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three flags clearly: Malaysia on the left, China in the center, and South Korea on the right, each flag's design fully visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the flags aligned edge-on, making the flag designs barely visible and showing the thinness of the fabric and poles.
description_view_2: Rear view with the flags in reverse order: South Korea on the left, China in the center, and Malaysia on the right, flag designs visible from the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the flags edge-on, with minimal visibility of the flag designs and emphasizing the alignment of the poles.
attribute_flag_design: The Malaysian flag features 14 red and white stripes, a blue canton with a yellow crescent and 14-point star; the Chinese flag is red with one large yellow star and four smaller yellow stars in an arc; the South Korean flag is white with a central red and blue yin-yang symbol and four black trigrams in each corner. Each flag is rectangular and proportionally sized.
